# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This is a personal portfolio project. Only the latest version on the `master` branch is actively maintained.

| Version | Supported |
|---|---|
| Latest (`master`) | ✅ |
| Older releases | ❌ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

If you discover a security issue — such as exposed credentials, a dependency with a known CVE, or a cross-site scripting risk — report it privately:

**Email:** muneerkhan31886@gmail.com  
**Subject line:** `[SECURITY] my-portfolio — brief description`

Include:
- A clear description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fix if you have one

I will acknowledge your report within **72 hours** and aim to resolve confirmed issues within **14 days**.

## Scope

| In scope | Out of scope |
|---|---|
| Exposed API keys or secrets in the repo | Issues with third-party services (EmailJS, Vercel) |
| Vulnerable npm dependencies | Social engineering |
| XSS risks in rendered content | Rate limiting or availability |

## Preferred Languages

English.
